title: Crude oil jumps back above $90 as Trump says U.S. will take Iran's Kharg Island
summary_full: Oil prices edged lower on Thursday after Kuwait closed its airspace and Israel warned of launches from Lebanon.
summary_public: Oil prices edged lower on Thursday after Kuwait closed its airspace and Israel warned of launches from Lebanon.
